produces.artifact: Structured lint report (stdout, not persisted to disk)

requirement.title: Core Module API
requirement.description: A scripts/lib/stale-lint.js module MUST expose a single entry function that scans the project and returns a structured report of all stale-lint findings.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: The module MUST export a function accepting projectRoot (string) and returning an array of finding objects, each with: rule (string), spec_id (string), severity ("warning"), message (string). REQ-F026, REQ-F027, REQ-F028
Given a project with no stale artifacts, the function MUST return an empty array. REQ-F026
The module MUST NOT throw on missing specs/ or docs/plans/ directories. Missing directories mean no findings for that category. REQ-N001

requirement.title: Design-Newer-Than-Spec Detection
requirement.description: The module MUST detect when a design iteration folder is newer than the spec's recorded design_iteration.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given specs/auth/spec.xml with design_iteration: 2026-04-01 and docs/plans/auth/2026-04-16/design.md existing, the module MUST return a finding with rule: "stale-spec", spec_id: "auth", message containing both dates. REQ-F026
The module MUST compare by folder name date (YYYY-MM-DD lexicographic), not by file modification timestamp. REQ-F026
If the spec's source/design_iteration matches the newest design folder date, the module MUST NOT produce a stale-spec finding for that spec. REQ-F026

requirement.title: Unrefined Design Detection
requirement.description: The module MUST detect when a docs/plans/<spec-id>/ folder exists but no corresponding specs/<spec-id>/spec.xml exists.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given docs/plans/new-feature/ with at least one iteration subfolder and no specs/new-feature/ directory, the module MUST return a finding with rule: "unrefined-design", spec_id: "new-feature". REQ-F027
An empty docs/plans/new-feature/ folder (no iteration subfolders) MUST NOT produce a finding. Only folders containing at least one YYYY-MM-DD subfolder with a design.md count. REQ-F027

requirement.title: Unplanned Spec Detection
requirement.description: The module MUST detect when specs/<spec-id>/spec.xml exists but specs/<spec-id>/dag.yaml does not.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given specs/auth/spec.xml exists and specs/auth/dag.yaml does not, the module MUST return a finding with rule: "unplanned-spec", spec_id: "auth". REQ-F028

requirement.title: Skill Definition
requirement.description: A skill (arc-linting) MUST exist that invokes the core module and presents findings to the user.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: The skill MUST be invocable via /arcforge:arc-linting. REQ-F026, REQ-F027, REQ-F028
When findings exist, the skill MUST present them grouped by rule type (stale-spec, unrefined-design, unplanned-spec) with actionable recommendations for each. REQ-F026, REQ-F027, REQ-F028
When no findings exist, the skill MUST report "no stale artifacts found". REQ-F026

The skill MUST support an optional spec-id argument to lint a single spec instead of all specs. Given /arcforge:arc-linting auth, only specs/auth/ and docs/plans/auth/ are checked. REQ-F026, REQ-F027, REQ-F028

The skill's frontmatter description MUST start with "Use when" and describe triggering conditions only (e.g., "Use when checking for stale artifacts, drift between design docs and specs, or unrefined/unplanned pipeline stages"). The description MUST NOT summarize the skill's process or output. REQ-F026, REQ-F027, REQ-F028

requirement.title: No Automatic Invocation
requirement.description: Stale lint MUST NOT run automatically via hooks or session start. It is user-initiated only.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: No SessionStart, PreToolUse, or other hook MUST reference stale-lint logic. The only entry point is the arc-linting skill. REQ-N001
